intro: Illigera trifoliata, also known as the three-leafed Illigera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hernandiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
